title: Events & Dates 2026
subtitle: Meet us in person
intro: From Stuttgart to Hamburg, from workshops to congresses — Polaris Diagnostics will be present at key events in 2026 where the future of practice diagnostics is being shaped. Together with Nobel Biocare, we showcase how Point-of-Care diagnostics transform everyday practice.
empty_text: There are currently no public events scheduled. Subscribe to our newsletter to stay informed, or schedule a personal appointment.
seo_description: Polaris Diagnostics at 5 events in 2026 — from Stuttgart to Hamburg. Point-of-Care diagnostics live with Nobel Biocare.
